Bash("C:\\ProgramData\\miniconda3\\envs\\ngs-sample-qc-lims\\python.exe" -c "
import sys, io
inputs = [
    ''1'', ''TEST-002'', ''TestSample2'', ''2'', ''Cell Line'', ''mRNA test'',  # register mRNA sample
    '''',  # pause
    ''2'',  # NanoDrop
    ''1'',  # select sample TEST-001 \(first\)
    ''50.5'',   # concentration
    ''1.95'',   # 260/280
    ''2.1'',    # 260/230
    ''1'',      # step: Extraction
    '''',       # pause
    ''3'',  # Qubit
    ''1'',  # select sample
    ''48.2'',   # concentration
    ''dsDNA HS'',  # assay type
    ''1'',      # step: Extraction
    '''',       # pause
    ''7'',  # status check
    '''',   # skip detail
    '''',   # pause
    ''0'',  # exit
]
sys.stdin = io.StringIO\(''\\n''.join\(inputs\)\)
from cli import main
main\(\)
")

Bash("C:\\ProgramData\\miniconda3\\envs\\ngs-sample-qc-lims\\python.exe" -c "
import sys, io

inputs = [
    # Register samples matching the CSV
    ''1'', ''WGS_001'', ''WGS Sample 001'', ''1'', '''', '''', '''',
    ''1'', ''WGS_002'', ''WGS Sample 002'', ''1'', '''', '''', '''',
    ''1'', ''WGS_003'', ''WGS Sample 003'', ''1'', '''', '''', '''',

    # Menu 4: Femto Pulse file
    ''4'',
    ''examples/femtopulse_sample.csv'',
    ''1'',          # step: Extraction

    # Mapping: WGS_001 -> WGS_001 \(enter = same\)
    '''',
    # WGS_002 -> same
    '''',
    # WGS_003 -> same
    '''',
    # WGS_001_Frag -> skip \(not registered\)
    ''s'',
    # WGS_002_Frag -> skip
    ''s'',
    # WGS_003_Frag -> skip
    ''s'',
    '''',

    # Check status with detail
    ''7'',
    ''WGS_001'',
    '''',

    ''0'',
]
sys.stdin = io.StringIO\(''\\n''.join\(inputs\)\)

from database import db_manager
db_manager.initialize\(\)
db_manager.reset_database\(\)

from cli import main
main\(\)
")

    ''2'',      # WGS_002
    ''4'',
    '''',

    # 6. Molarity - WGS_003
    ''6'',
    ''1'',      # WGS_003
    ''4'',
    '''',

    # 7. Status check all + detail WGS_001
    ''7'',
    ''WGS_001'',
    '''',

    ''0'',
]
sys.stdin = io.StringIO\(''\\n''.join\(inputs\)\)
from cli import main
main\(\)
")
